title: Mourners Chant ‘Revenge’ at Funeral Prayers for Iran’s Slain Supreme Leader
summary_full: On the second day of public mourning for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in February, there was still no sign of his son and successor, Mojtaba Khamenei.
summary_public: On the second day of public mourning for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in February, there was still no sign of his son and successor, Mojtaba Khamenei.
